DISCOVERY 612, PRESENT: H. NELSON MEEKS, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY, JOSE OROPEZA. ELIZABETH WILLIMS, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY. HEARING HELD. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED EXCEPT AS TO THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS. (TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO SPECIAL AND FORM INTERROGATORIES, AND FOR AN ORDER ESTABLISHING ADMISSIONS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND TO THE DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, THE SPECIAL AND FORM INTERROGATORIES, AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $615, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER). MODIFICATION: THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS ARE DEEMED ADMITTED IS DELETED. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
